states.name: Adena
states.title: Blue Hurricane
states.description:
Despite her young age, Adena is the first mate and right hand of Dargarossa, the fearsome Bane of the Ashiran Sea. While on her way to be sold as a slave in a far-off land, her ship was raided by Dargarossa and she was freed; with nowhere else to go, she decided to stick around, and became a pirate. Though free-spirited, she respects Dargarossa deeply.
When the call to board is sounded and the battle is joined, she's the first one across the gap, leaping to the deck of the other ship and laying waste around her with her spear. Despite her young age, the crew respects her second only to the Captain himself, and they call her "Sis".

states.name: Adena
states.title: Blue Hurricane
states.description:
Cap'n, it weren't me what hit you with the ball! It was Sis! C'mon, Sis, back me— huh?! Where'd she go?!
"......"
"C'mon, Cap'n, calm down! Huh? Yer gettin' a bump on yer head? Nah, that's just what yer head always looks—Aaaaugh!"
Splash!
"Whew, he went far! Might be a new record. Ah, hey, land ho! Someone haul that sorry carcass outta the drink and make ready for landfall!"
